name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement

## Problem
<!-- What are you trying to do that teletty makes hard or impossible? -->

## Proposed solution
<!-- A clear, concrete proposal. UI mock, command name, env var, anything specific. -->

## Alternatives considered
<!-- Workarounds you've tried, other tools that solve this differently -->

## Scope check
- [ ] This fits teletty's "zero frameworks, zero build step" architecture
- [ ] This does not weaken any of the 7 security layers
- [ ] I am willing to send a PR (optional)
